channel.title: OTRS AG — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by OTRS AG (otrs).

item.title: CVE-2026-48187 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Email with special content can lead to DoS
item.description: An uncontrolled allocation of resources without limits or throttling in the e-mail handling in OTRS allows excessive allocation which may lead to the abortion of the webserver.This issue affects OTRS: * 8.0.X * 2023.X * 2024.X * 2025.X * 2026.X befor…

item.title: CVE-2026-48188 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SQL Injection via MySQL Quote Method
item.description: An improper Input Validation vulnerability in OTRS or ((OTRS)) Community Edition database layer module allows an unauthenticated SQL injection which can lead to an authentication bypass. This issue only affects the system if the MySQL/MariaDB server…

item.title: CVE-2026-48189 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Bypass DedicatedAgentToCustomerGroups Setting
item.description: An improper Input Validation vulnerability in OTRS Customer Backend module allows to access customer information which are restricted to other groups. Please note that the feature has to be anabled and CustomerGroupSupport has to be used to be affect…

item.title: CVE-2026-48190 · 3.5 LOW — Incorrect handling of permissions in External Interface Config Item List module
item.description: An incorrect handling of permissions in OTRS External Interface and the ConfigItem List module allows an authenticated customer to query the system for CI information. Please note that CMDB has to be anabled and CustomerGroupSupport has to be used to…

item.title: CVE-2026-48191 · 3.5 LOW — Wrong Permission Handling in Document Search Article Meta Filters
item.description: An incorrect handling of permissions in STORM powered by OTRS and in OTRS (2026.x and above) Document Search Article Meta Filters modules allows gaining knowledge about number of affected CIs, SLA and services without gaining access to them. This iss…

item.title: CVE-2026-48208 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Denial-of-Service via SVG Rendering in Ticket
item.description: An improper neutralization of active SVG content in OTRS or ((OTRS)) Community Edition ticket article rendering allows attackers to inject specially crafted SVG payloads via email content, leading to browser-side resource exhaustion and denial of ser…

item.title: CVE-2026-48209 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Reflected XSS in authenticated agent context
item.description: An improper neutralization of user-controllable input in OTRS or ((OTRS)) Community Edition ticket handling allows authenticated attackers to perform reflected cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks via crafted request parameters associated with ticket a…

item.title: CVE-2026-48210 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Possible information disclosure via External Interface
item.description: An improper default configuration in OTRS 2026.3.1 causes ticket article forwarding actions to enforce the “Is visible for customer” flag by default and prevent users from disabling it via the UI. This leads to unintended exposure of internal ticket…

item.title: CVE-2026-6060 · 4.5 MEDIUM — Possible DoS via SQL Box
item.description: A vulnerability in the SQL Box in the admin interface of OTRS leads to an uncontrolled resource consumption leading to a DoS against the webserver. will be killed by the systemThis issue affects OTRS: * 7.0.X * 8.0.X * 2023.X * 2024.X * 2025.X * 2026…

item.title: CVE-2025-24391 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Possible user enumeration
item.description: A vulnerability in the External Interface of OTRS allows conclusions to be drawn about the existence of user accounts through different HTTP response codes and messages. This enables an attacker to systematically identify valid email addresses. This…

item.title: CVE-2025-24388 · 3.8 LOW — Unsafe handling of AJAX calls
item.description: A vulnerability in the OTRS Admin Interface and Agent Interface (versions before OTRS 8) allow parameter injection due to for an autheniticated agent or admin user. This issue affects: * OTRS 7.0.X * OTRS 8.0.X * OTRS 2023.X * OTRS 2024.X * OTRS 2025…

item.title: CVE-2025-24387 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Missing CSRF protection
item.description: A vulnerability in OTRS Application Server allows session hijacking due to missing attributes for sensitive cookie settings in HTTPS sessions. A request to an OTRS endpoint from a possible malicious web site, would send the authentication cookie, per…

item.title: CVE-2025-24390 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Missing Cookie Flags
item.description: A vulnerability in OTRS Application Server and reverse proxy settings allows session hijacking due to missing attributes for sensitive cookie settings in HTTPS sessions. This issue affects: * OTRS 7.0.X * OTRS 8.0.X * OTRS 2023.X * OTRS 2024.X

item.title: CVE-2025-24389 · 6.3 MEDIUM — SMTP Password will be shown in cleartext on some SMTP errors
item.description: Certain errors of the upstream libraries will insert sensitive information in the OTRS or ((OTRS)) Community Edition log mechanism and mails send to the system administrator. This issue affects: * OTRS 7.0.X * OTRS 8.0.X * OTRS 2023.X * OTRS 2024.X *…

item.title: CVE-2024-43446 · 3.5 LOW — Improper check of permissions in Generic Interface
item.description: An improper privilege management vulnerability in OTRS Generic Interface module allows change of the Ticket status even if the user only has ro permissions. This issue affects: * OTRS 7.0.X * OTRS 8.0.X * OTRS 2023.X * OTRS 2024.X * ((OTRS)) Communit…

item.title: CVE-2024-43445 · 5.4 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Missing X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff Header Allows MIME Type Sniffing
item.description: A vulnerability exists in OTRS and ((OTRS Community Edition)) that fail to set the HTTP response header X-Content-Type-Options to nosniff. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability by uploading or inserting content that would be treated as a diffe…

item.title: CVE-2024-43444 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Passwords are written to Admin Log Module
item.description: Passwords of agents and customers are displayed in plain text in the OTRS admin log module if certain configurations regarding the authentication sources match and debugging for the authentication backend has been enabled. This issue affects: * OTRS…

item.title: CVE-2024-43443 · 4.9 MEDIUM — Stored XSS in process management
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input done by an attacker with admin privileges ('Cross-site Scripting') in Process Management modules of OTRS and ((OTRS)) Community Edition allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) within the Process Management targeting other a…

item.title: CVE-2024-43442 · 4.9 MEDIUM — Stored XSS in System Configuration
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input done by an attacker with admin privileges ('Cross-site Scripting') in OTRS (System Configuration modules) and ((OTRS)) Community Edition allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) within the System Configuration targeting othe…

item.title: CVE-2024-23794 · 5.2 MEDIUM — Agents are able to lock the ticket without the "Owner" permission
item.description: An incorrect privilege assignment vulnerability in the inline editing functionality of OTRS can lead to privilege escalation. This flaw allows an agent with read-only permissions to gain full access to a ticket. This issue arises in very rare instanc…

item.title: CVE-2024-6540 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Information exlosure in external interface
item.description: Improper filtering of fields when using the export function in the ticket overview of the external interface in OTRS could allow an authorized user to download a list of tickets containing information about tickets of other customers. The problem onl…

item.title: CVE-2024-23793 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Upload of files outside application directory
item.description: The file upload feature in OTRS and ((OTRS)) Community Edition has a path traversal vulnerability. This issue permits authenticated agents or customer users to upload potentially harmful files to directories accessible by the web server, potentially…

item.title: CVE-2024-23790 · 3.5 LOW — Missing file type check in avatar picture upload
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in the upload functionality for user avatars allows functionality misuse due to missing check of filetypes. This issue affects OTRS: from 7.0.X through 7.0.48, from 8.0.X through 8.0.37, from 2023 through 2023.…

item.title: CVE-2024-23791 · 4.9 MEDIUM — Unnecessary data is written to log if issues during indexing occurs
item.description: Insertion of debug information into log file during building the elastic search index allows reading of sensitive information from articles.This issue affects OTRS: from 7.0.X through 7.0.48, from 8.0.X through 8.0.37, from 2023.X through 2023.1.1.

item.title: CVE-2024-23792 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Insufficient access control
item.description: When adding attachments to ticket comments, another user can add attachments as well impersonating the orginal user. The attack requires a logged-in other user to know the UUID. While the legitimate user completes the comment, the malicious user can…

item.title: CVE-2023-6254 · 8.1 HIGH — Password is send back to client
item.description: A Vulnerability in OTRS AgentInterface and ExternalInterface allows the reading of plain text passwords which are send back to the client in the server response- This issue affects OTRS: from 8.0.X through 8.0.37.

item.title: CVE-2023-5421 · 3.5 LOW — Possible XSS execution in customer information
item.description: An attacker who is logged into OTRS as an user with privileges to create and change customer user data may manipulate the CustomerID field to execute JavaScript code that runs immediatly after the data is saved.The issue onlyoccurs if the configurati…

item.title: CVE-2023-38059 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — External pictures can be loaded even if not allowed by configuration
item.description: The loading of external images is not blocked, even if configured, if the attacker uses protocol-relative URL in the payload. This can be used to retreive the IP of the user.This issue affects OTRS: from 7.0.X before 7.0.47, from 8.0.X before 8.0.37;…

item.title: CVE-2023-5422 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — SSL Certificates are not checked for E-Mail Handling
item.description: The functions to fetch e-mail via POP3 or IMAP as well as sending e-mail via SMTP use OpenSSL for static SSL or TLS based communication. As the SSL_get_verify_result() function is not used the certificated is trusted always and it can not be ensured…

item.title: CVE-2023-38060 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Host header injection by attachments in web service
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in the ContentType parameter for attachments on TicketCreate or TicketUpdate operations of the OTRS Generic Interface modules allows any authenticated attacker to to perform an host header injection for the Con…

item.title: CVE-2023-38058 · 4.1 MEDIUM — Tickets can be moved without permissions
item.description: An improper privilege check in the OTRS ticket move action in the agent interface allows any as agent authenticated attacker to to perform a move of an ticket without the needed permission. This issue affects OTRS: from 8.0.X before 8.0.35.

item.title: CVE-2023-38057 · 4.1 MEDIUM — XSS stored in survey answers
item.description: An improper input validation vulnerability in OTRS Survey modules allows any attacker with a link to a valid and unanswered survey request to inject javascript code in free text answers. This allows a cross site scripting attack while reading the rep…

item.title: CVE-2023-38056 · 7.2 HIGH — Code execution via System Configuration
item.description: Improper Neutralization of commands allowed to be executed via OTRS System Configuration e.g. SchedulerCronTaskModule using UnitTests modules allows any authenticated attacker with admin privileges local execution of Code.This issue affects OTRS: fro…

item.title: CVE-2023-2534 · 7.6 HIGH — Information disclouse and DoS via websocket push events
item.description: Improper Authorization vulnerability in OTRS AG OTRS 8 (Websocket API backend) allows any as Agent authenticated attacker to track user behaviour and to gain live insight into overall system usage. User IDs can easily be correlated with real names e.…

item.title: CVE-2023-1250 · 7.4 HIGH — Code execution through ACL creation
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in OTRS AG OTRS (ACL modules), OTRS AG ((OTRS)) Community Edition (ACL modules) allows Local Execution of Code. When creating/importing an ACL it was possible to inject code that gets executed via manipulated c…

item.title: CVE-2023-1248 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Possible XSS in Ticket Actions
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in OTRS AG OTRS (Ticket Actions modules), OTRS AG ((OTRS)) Community Edition (Ticket Actions modules) allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS).This issue affects OTRS: from 7.0.X before 7.0.42; ((OTRS)) Community Edit…

item.title: CVE-2022-4427 · 6.5 MEDIUM — SQL Injection via OTRS Search API
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in OTRS AG OTRS, OTRS AG ((OTRS)) Community Edition allows SQL Injection via TicketSearch Webservice This issue affects OTRS: from 7.0.1 before 7.0.40 Patch 1, from 8.0.1 before 8.0.28 Patch 1; ((OTRS)) Communi…

item.title: CVE-2022-3501 · 3.5 LOW — Information exposure of template content due to missing check of permissions
item.description: Article template contents with sensitive data could be accessed from agents without permissions.

item.title: CVE-2022-39052 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — DoS attack using email
item.description: An external attacker is able to send a specially crafted email (with many recipients) and trigger a potential DoS of the system

item.title: CVE-2022-39051 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Perl Code execution in Template Toolkit
item.description: Attacker might be able to execute malicious Perl code in the Template toolkit, by having the admin installing an unverified 3th party package

item.title: CVE-2022-39050 · 4.6 MEDIUM — Possible XSS stored in customer information
item.description: An attacker who is logged into OTRS as an admin user may manipulate customer URL field to store JavaScript code to be run later by any other agent when clicking the customer URL link. Then the stored JavaScript is executed in the context of OTRS. The…

item.title: CVE-2022-39049 · 3.5 LOW — Possible XSS in Admin Interface
item.description: An attacker who is logged into OTRS as an admin user may manipulate the URL to cause execution of JavaScript in the context of OTRS.

item.title: CVE-2022-32741 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Information disclosure in Request New Password feature
item.description: Attacker is able to determine if the provided username exists (and it's valid) using Request New Password feature, based on the response time.

item.title: CVE-2022-32740 · 3.5 LOW — Information disclosure in the External Interface
item.description: A reply to a forwarded email article by a 3rd party could unintensionally expose the email content to the ticket customer under certain circumstances.

item.title: CVE-2022-32739 · 3.5 LOW — OTRS version number is always in the exported ICS files
item.description: When Secure::DisableBanner system configuration has been disabled and agent shares his calendar via public URL, received ICS file contains OTRS release number.

item.title: CVE-2022-1004 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Information disclosure in the External Interface
item.description: Accounted time is shown in the Ticket Detail View (External Interface), even if ExternalFrontend::TicketDetailView###AccountedTimeDisplay is disabled.

item.title: CVE-2022-0475 · 3.5 LOW — Possible XSS attack via translation
item.description: Malicious translator is able to inject JavaScript code in few translatable strings (where HTML is allowed). The code could be executed in the Package manager. This issue affects: OTRS AG OTRS 7.0.x version: 7.0.32 and prior versions, 8.0.x version: 8…

item.title: CVE-2021-36100 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Authenticated remote code execution
item.description: Specially crafted string in OTRS system configuration can allow the execution of any system command.

item.title: CVE-2022-0474 · 2.4 LOW — Disclosure of mail addresses
item.description: Full list of recipients from customer users in a contact field could be disclosed in notification emails event when the notification is set to be sent to each recipient individually. This issue affects: OTRS AG OTRSCustomContactFields 8.0.x version:…

item.title: CVE-2022-0473 · 3.8 LOW — Dynamic field error message is vulnerable to XSS
item.description: OTRS administrators can configure dynamic field and inject malicious JavaScript code in the error message of the regular expression check. When used in the agent interface, malicious code might be exectued in the browser. This issue affects: OTRS AG…
